example_prompt: A room where the agent must push a blue box onto a pressure plate to open a gate.
abstract_task: move a dynamic object to a target region, optionally followed by mechanism activation
core_affordances: target region is non-blocking sensor geometry
agent, object, and target region are roughly aligned
object starts close enough to target region for the generic push controller
common_failures: object too far from target region
target region created as a solid blocker instead of sensor=True
agent starts on the wrong side of the object
solid wall lies between object and region
